hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of National Hairstylist Appreciation Day, a fun musical that celebrates the art of hairstyling is a perfect choice. With its energetic dance numbers and memorable characters, this film is sure to delight audiences of all ages.
hero.blurb: Get ready to sing and dance along with this classic musical that showcases the best of 60s fashion and music. With an all-star cast, including John Travolta and Queen Latifah, this film is a must-watch for anyone who loves a good musical.

released.title: Live Free or Die Hard
released.reason: Released today in 2007, this action-packed sequel still thrills audiences with its non-stop action and memorable one-liners. With Bruce Willis reprising his iconic role as John McClane, this film is a must-watch for fans of the Die Hard series.
released.blurb: Get ready for non-stop action and suspense as John McClane takes on a group of tech-savvy terrorists in this thrilling sequel. With its impressive stunts and witty dialogue, this film is sure to keep you on the edge of your seat.

birthday.title: Postcards from the Edge
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Meryl Streep, born June 27, 1949, a highly acclaimed actress who shines in this comedy-drama about a complex mother-daughter relationship. This film showcases her incredible range and talent as an actress, making it a standout in her impressive filmography.
birthday.blurb: With its sharp wit and poignant storytelling, this film is a must-watch for anyone who loves a good drama. Meryl Streep and Shirley MacLaine deliver powerful performances as a mother-daughter duo struggling to come to terms with their complicated past.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: a famously bad movie with terrible reviews, this psychological thriller is often cited as one of the worst films of the 2000s, with a convoluted plot and cringe-worthy acting.
awful.blurb: With its nonsensical plot twists and over-the-top performances, this film is so bad it's good, making it a must-watch for fans of unintentional comedy. Lindsay Lohan's dual roles are a highlight of this messy, melodramatic thriller that will leave you scratching your head.
